cards.name: Legend
cards.source_section: Current MITC (MITC_Premium.pdf) Schedule of Fees p.1 (Legend: Joining Rs.5,000 / Annual NIL) + Other Financial Charges p.2 (interest 3.95%/mo, 47.40%/pa; forex 1.8%). Enrichment from Legend_Benefit_Guide_19-12-2025.pdf. NOTE: file-level source_url is the legacy 2016 MITC; Legend fees from the current MITC_Premium.pdf.

bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of the advance amount subject to a minimum of Rs.300
bank_defaults.cash_interest: Interest rate of 3.83% per month (46% per annum) levied on the current outstanding balance on a daily basis if Total Amount Due is not paid off by due date; interest is also levied on all fee, charges, interest and service tax. On cash advances, interest is levied from the transaction date itself.
bank_defaults.interest_free_days: Up to 50 days; Interest-free period is not applicable if Total Amount Due is not paid in full
bank_defaults.source_section: OTHER FINANCIAL CHARGES table p.2 (Interest Charge 'For All Cards' 3.83% monthly / 46% annual; Interest-free Period; Late Payment Charges; Cash Advance Charges; Foreign Currency Mark-up 3.5%)
